query:
SELECT table_name, table_rows
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()
  AND table_name IN (
    'user_wallets',
    'withdrawals',
    'wallet_ledger',
    'platform_wallet',
    'withdrawal_settlements',
    'financial_settings',
    'withdrawal_config'
  )
ORDER BY table_name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2QhtR3vkBoFkFzg.bea0b6e60b41 --database 8pdnKAMC4AMrGe9CxvLDut --execute
